maml:description.maml:para: Emphasize a takeaway or warning inside a bordered callout.
Emphasize a takeaway or warning inside a bordered callout.

command:example.maml:title: Example 1

dev:remarks.maml:para: Demonstrates Add-SlideBox in a TerminalSlides workflow.

maml:description.maml:para: Add a bullet and optionally reveal it after earlier content.
Add a bullet and optionally reveal it after earlier content.

command:example.maml:title: Example 1

dev:remarks.maml:para: Demonstrates Add-SlideBullet in a TerminalSlides workflow.

maml:description.maml:para: Visualize labeled values as bars, a line, sparkline, or gauge.
Visualize labeled values as bars, a line, sparkline, or gauge.
Specifies the ChartType value. Accepted values: HorizontalBar, Bar, Line, Sparkline, Gauge.
Specifies the ChartType value. Accepted values: HorizontalBar, Bar, Line, Sparkline, Gauge.

command:example.maml:title: Example 1

dev:remarks.maml:para: Demonstrates Add-SlideChart in a TerminalSlides workflow.

maml:description.maml:para: Render a syntax-highlighted code block with an optional border.
Render a syntax-highlighted code block with an optional border.

command:example.maml:title: Example 1
command:example.dev:code: $deck | Add-TerminalSlide -Title 'Code' -Layout CodeFocus -Content { Add-SlideCode ` -Code "Get-Process | Sort-Object CPU -Descending" ` -Language powershell ` -Region Code ` -Border } | Out-Null

dev:remarks.maml:para: Demonstrates Add-SlideCode in a TerminalSlides workflow.

maml:description.maml:para: Build a lightweight node-and-edge diagram with the diagram DSL.
Build a lightweight node-and-edge diagram with the diagram DSL.

command:example.maml:title: Example 1

dev:remarks.maml:para: Demonstrates Add-SlideDiagram in a TerminalSlides workflow.

maml:description.maml:para: Connect two declared diagram nodes and optionally label their relationship.
Connect two declared diagram nodes and optionally label their relationship.

command:example.maml:title: Example 1

dev:remarks.maml:para: Demonstrates Add-SlideDiagramEdge in a TerminalSlides workflow.

maml:description.maml:para: Declare a labeled node inside an Add-SlideDiagram content block.
Declare a labeled node inside an Add-SlideDiagram content block.

command:example.maml:title: Example 1

dev:remarks.maml:para: Demonstrates Add-SlideDiagramNode in a TerminalSlides workflow.

maml:description.maml:para: Render a local image as truecolor terminal cells with accessible fallback text.
Render a local image as truecolor terminal cells with accessible fallback text.

command:example.maml:title: Example 1
command:example.dev:code:
$imagePath = Join-Path ` (Get-Module TerminalSlides).ModuleBase ` 'Assets/presentation-team-photo.jpg'
$deck | Add-TerminalSlide ` -Title 'Team rehearsal' ` -Layout ImageFocus ` -Content { Add-SlideImage ` -Path $imagePath ` -AltText 'Three engineers rehearsing a presentation' ` -Region Image } | Out-Null

dev:remarks.maml:para: Demonstrates Add-SlideImage in a TerminalSlides workflow.

maml:description.maml:para: Attach private speaker notes to the slide currently being composed.
Attach private speaker notes to the slide currently being composed.

command:example.maml:title: Example 1

dev:remarks.maml:para: Demonstrates Add-SlideNotes in a TerminalSlides workflow.

maml:description.maml:para: Add a centered quotation with optional attribution.
Add a centered quotation with optional attribution.

command:example.maml:title: Example 1

dev:remarks.maml:para: Demonstrates Add-SlideQuote in a TerminalSlides workflow.

maml:description.maml:para: Add supporting subtitle text with optional alignment and progressive reveal.
Add supporting subtitle text with optional alignment and progressive reveal.
Specifies the Alignment value. Accepted values: Left, Center, Right.
Specifies the Alignment value. Accepted values: Left, Center, Right.

command:example.maml:title: Example 1

dev:remarks.maml:para: Demonstrates Add-SlideSubtitle in a TerminalSlides workflow.

maml:description.maml:para: Format PowerShell objects as a table within the selected slide region.
Format PowerShell objects as a table within the selected slide region.

command:example.maml:title: Example 1

dev:remarks.maml:para: Demonstrates Add-SlideTable in a TerminalSlides workflow.

maml:description.maml:para: Add wrapped prose with alignment, color, reveal, and overflow options.
Add wrapped prose with alignment, color, reveal, and overflow options.
Specifies the Alignment value. Accepted values: Left, Center, Right.
Specifies the OverflowBehavior value. Accepted values: Wrap, Truncate, Scroll.
Specifies the Alignment value. Accepted values: Left, Center, Right.
Specifies the OverflowBehavior value. Accepted values: Wrap, Truncate, Scroll.

command:example.maml:title: Example 1

dev:remarks.maml:para: Demonstrates Add-SlideText in a TerminalSlides workflow.

maml:description.maml:para: Add a prominent title element inside a slide region.
Add a prominent title element inside a slide region.
Specifies the Alignment value. Accepted values: Left, Center, Right.
Specifies the Alignment value. Accepted values: Left, Center, Right.

command:example.maml:title: Example 1

dev:remarks.maml:para: Demonstrates Add-SlideTitle in a TerminalSlides workflow.

maml:description.maml:para: Append a slide through the pipeline and compose its elements with the slide DSL.
Append a slide through the pipeline and compose its elements with the slide DSL.

command:example.maml:title: Example 1
command:example.dev:code: $deck | Add-TerminalSlide ` -Title 'Agenda' ` -Layout TitleAndContent ` -Content { Add-SlideBullet 'Architecture' Add-SlideBullet 'Delivery plan' } | Out-Null

dev:remarks.maml:para: Demonstrates Add-TerminalSlide in a TerminalSlides workflow.

maml:description.maml:para: Clone a slide and append it or insert it at a requested position.
Clone a slide and append it or insert it at a requested position.

command:example.maml:title: Example 1
command:example.dev:code: $deck | Copy-TerminalSlide ` -Index 2 ` -DestinationIndex 4 | Out-Null

dev:remarks.maml:para: Demonstrates Copy-TerminalSlide in a TerminalSlides workflow.

maml:description.maml:para: Write a deck as ANSI, plain text, Markdown, HTML, PSD1, or JSON.
Write a deck as ANSI, plain text, Markdown, HTML, PSD1, or JSON.
Specifies the Format value. Accepted values: Ansi, PlainText, Markdown, Html, Psd1, Json.
Specifies the Format value. Accepted values: Ansi, PlainText, Markdown, Html, Psd1, Json.

command:example.maml:title: Example 1
command:example.dev:code:
$exportPath = Join-Path ` ([IO.Path]::GetTempPath()) 'terminalslides-deck.html'
Export-TerminalPresentation ` -Presentation $deck ` -Format Html ` -Path $exportPath

dev:remarks.maml:para: Demonstrates Export-TerminalPresentation in a TerminalSlides workflow.

maml:description.maml:para: Inspect terminal dimensions, color, Unicode, graphics, redirection, and interactivity support.
Inspect terminal dimensions, color, Unicode, graphics, redirection, and interactivity support.

command:example.maml:title: Example 1
command:example.dev:code: Get-TerminalPresentationCapability | Format-List HostName, Width, Height, ` TrueColorSupport, UnicodeSupport, Interactive

dev:remarks.maml:para: Demonstrates Get-TerminalPresentationCapability in a TerminalSlides workflow.

maml:description.maml:para: List every registered theme or retrieve one theme by name.
List every registered theme or retrieve one theme by name.

command:example.maml:title: Example 1
command:example.dev:code:
Get-TerminalPresentationTheme
$midnight = Get-TerminalPresentationTheme ` -Name Midnight

dev:remarks.maml:para: Demonstrates Get-TerminalPresentationTheme in a TerminalSlides workflow.

maml:description.maml:para: Retrieve every slide or select one by one-based index or exact title.
Retrieve every slide or select one by one-based index or exact title.

command:example.maml:title: Example 1
command:example.dev:code: $allSlides = $deck | Get-TerminalSlide $first = $deck | Get-TerminalSlide -Index 1 $agenda = $deck | Get-TerminalSlide -Title 'Agenda'

dev:remarks.maml:para: Demonstrates Get-TerminalSlide in a TerminalSlides workflow.

maml:description.maml:para: Load a presentation from PSD1, JSON, Markdown, or Markdown-compatible content.
Load a presentation from PSD1, JSON, Markdown, or Markdown-compatible content.

command:example.maml:title: Example 1
command:example.dev:code:
$jsonPath = Join-Path ` ([IO.Path]::GetTempPath()) 'terminalslides-deck.json' Export-TerminalPresentation ` -Presentation $deck -Format Json -Path $jsonPath | Out-Null
$importedDeck = Import-TerminalPresentation -Path $jsonPath

dev:remarks.maml:para: Demonstrates Import-TerminalPresentation in a TerminalSlides workflow.

maml:description.maml:para: Move a slide to a new one-based position and reindex the deck.
Move a slide to a new one-based position and reindex the deck.

command:example.maml:title: Example 1
command:example.dev:code: $deck | Move-TerminalSlide ` -Index 4 ` -DestinationIndex 2 | Out-Null

dev:remarks.maml:para: Demonstrates Move-TerminalSlide in a TerminalSlides workflow.

maml:description.maml:para: Create an empty presentation and set its title, author, theme, and viewport defaults.
Create an empty presentation and set its title, author, theme, and viewport defaults.

command:example.maml:title: Example 1
command:example.dev:code: $deck = New-TerminalPresentation ` -Title 'Quarterly engineering review' ` -Subtitle 'Platform reliability' ` -Author 'Engineering' ` -Theme Midnight

dev:remarks.maml:para: Demonstrates New-TerminalPresentation in a TerminalSlides workflow.

maml:description.maml:para: Create and register a reusable truecolor theme for the current session.
Create and register a reusable truecolor theme for the current session.
Specifies the BoxDrawingStyle value. Accepted values: unicode, ascii, double, rounded, single.
Specifies the HeadingStyle value. Accepted values: plain, bold, banner.
Specifies the BoxDrawingStyle value. Accepted values: unicode, ascii, double, rounded, single.
Specifies the HeadingStyle value. Accepted values: plain, bold, banner.

command:example.maml:title: Example 1
command:example.dev:code:
New-TerminalPresentationTheme ` -Name Ocean ` -Background '#06131F' ` -Foreground '#E7F5FF' ` -Primary '#38BDF8' ` -Accent '#A78BFA' | Out-Null
$deck = New-TerminalPresentation ` -Title 'Ocean deck' -Theme Ocean

dev:remarks.maml:para: Demonstrates New-TerminalPresentationTheme in a TerminalSlides workflow.

maml:description.maml:para: Remove a slide by one-based index and keep remaining indices contiguous.
Remove a slide by one-based index and keep remaining indices contiguous.

command:example.maml:title: Example 1
command:example.dev:code: $deck | Remove-TerminalSlide ` -Index 3 | Out-Null

dev:remarks.maml:para: Demonstrates Remove-TerminalSlide in a TerminalSlides workflow.

maml:description.maml:para: Update the title, layout, notes, background, or hidden state of a slide.
Update the title, layout, notes, background, or hidden state of a slide.

command:example.maml:title: Example 1
command:example.dev:code: $deck | Set-TerminalSlide ` -Index 2 ` -Title 'Updated roadmap' ` -Notes 'Call out the revised date.' | Out-Null

dev:remarks.maml:para: Demonstrates Set-TerminalSlide in a TerminalSlides workflow.

maml:description.maml:para: Present a deck interactively, or render it sequentially when output is redirected.
Present a deck interactively, or render it sequentially when output is redirected.
Specifies the ImageRenderer value. Accepted values: Blocks, Sixel.
Specifies the ImageRenderer value. Accepted values: Blocks, Sixel.
Specifies the ImageRenderer value. Accepted values: Blocks, Sixel.

command:example.maml:title: Example 1
command:example.dev:code: Show-TerminalPresentation -Presentation $deck

dev:remarks.maml:para: Demonstrates Show-TerminalPresentation in a TerminalSlides workflow.

maml:description.maml:para: Launch the TerminalSlides feature tour or the Intune Hydration Kit showcase, or return either deck for inspection.
Launch the TerminalSlides feature tour or the Intune Hydration Kit showcase, or return either deck for inspection.
Specifies the Name value. Accepted values: TerminalSlides, IntuneHydrationKit.
Specifies the Name value. Accepted values: TerminalSlides, IntuneHydrationKit.

command:example.maml:title: Example 1
command:example.dev:code:
Start-TerminalSlidesDemo Start-TerminalSlidesDemo -Name IntuneHydrationKit
# Inspect a showcase without presenting it: $demo = Start-TerminalSlidesDemo ` -Name IntuneHydrationKit -PassThru

dev:remarks.maml:para: Demonstrates Start-TerminalSlidesDemo in a TerminalSlides workflow.

maml:description.maml:para: Check every slide for overflow at one or more terminal viewport sizes.
Check every slide for overflow at one or more terminal viewport sizes.

command:example.maml:title: Example 1
command:example.dev:code:
$results = Test-TerminalPresentation ` -Presentation $deck ` -Viewport '80x24', '120x35'
$results | Format-Table Viewport, Slide, Fits

dev:remarks.maml:para: Demonstrates Test-TerminalPresentation in a TerminalSlides workflow.
